{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321142312DE78B49E1CD8A5F54B29"}"},"total":1852},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7577580567090758425","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不愧是9.7分。很值得很好看
关于人物性格背景简介已经写的很详细了。我再补一个两人之间的感情发展。一开始钟老板是情不自禁对谢大人好，爱而不自知，谢大人很通透，其实比钟老板明白的早，但是一直在纵容[奸笑]要不然以他的性格，估计在钟老板刚示好的时候就默默远离了。钟老板明白自己心意后，谢大人终于“狠下心来”想远离钟老板，谁想钟老板是推不开的😄反而激起了斗志，想要站到高位和谢大人比肩，就这个双强爽！！！俩人很快就在一起了，后来更是甜度爆表，钟老板爱的赤诚热烈，从不掩饰自己的爱，而谢大人一个冷静自持的人，明知道这份爱公开会对自己造成一些不好的影响，却也从未想过隐藏，两个人就这样大大方方甜甜蜜蜜的[饱了]最后的最后，希望两位一直幸福"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764296012,"group_id":"7563590143009901593","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8voX274WVH8wdNwfBfMloJ5qwqvS55TZudtZm0xXLoS","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b7e2fc0a12f94dfd9331b467a6de4d09~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616197&x-signature=No1afdTjxPuYQiV%2Ba6AzByxLgD0%3D","user_id":"3311379219748411","user_name":"爱吃火锅的檀老三"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3311379219748411","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1649093374,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7563590143009901593","book_info":{"abstract":"【现代直球倒霉透顶穿越攻×心思深沉美强惨丞相受】
【今穿古+高冷之花+死对头+双向奔赴+权谋+双强+HE】
钟岐云，史上最倒霉的穿越者，开局即死囚。
他却偏要挣条活路，更妄图摘下那轮高悬九天的应疏寒月。
破杀局、建漕运、他与大海搏命、终究苦尽甘来，开创海上丝绸之路、成为一代“官商”。他光明正大地将天下第一的权臣拥入怀中：“谢问渊，你看着天下，我护着你。”
世人皆说谢问渊权倾朝野、冷骨无情。
却不知他弃武从文，甘愿囚于朝堂博弈。
他曾以为自己终将孤身赴深渊。
——直到那个从死牢爬出的商贾，为他捧来四方美酒、闯过滔天烈火，肆无忌惮地踏过横亘在二人之间的山河。
钟岐云：“我要这天下同我一样敬你重你，我要那史官写下‘谢问渊’三个字时心中皆是崇敬、生不出一丝狭吝！”
——我不要盛世婚礼，只要千秋史笔，公正书写你姓名。
“你是我打破谋划恣意的抉择，我自愿青史流芳，但我更想与你并肩而立并肩而行。”
——钟岐云，我们成婚。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/75216f8e396797c3787f2efdd070a6d0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"怪诞江阳","author_id":"","book_id":"7563590143009901593","book_name":"史上最倒霉穿越","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c89090","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"92.1万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":972,"name":"情感小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=972&name=情感小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7563607656791804952","read_count":"96115","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"679859"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"207","tags":"精品小说,情感小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/75216f8e396797c3787f2efdd070a6d0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258192&x-signature=hJlOVMQ92wPUxA78XcEGSLCzzFs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"476"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321142312DE78B49E1CD8A5F54B29"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读39小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":70,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":78315,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":142032,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":35857},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7571799692160484121","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看！有深度也有甜度，主角穿成死囚，遇到了神秘的官员，命运的齿轮开始转动，爱是不明心意却不由自主靠近，是海平面之下的暗潮汹涌，是彼此心照不宣的珍惜爱护。
两个男主各自有自己的事业和理想，人设非常清晰，不是幼稚甜宠文，他们的爱情真实又震撼！看完心里非常暖，星辰大海和真心相爱同样重要，他们并肩而立，相拥相守，千言万语难以诉说，这本书是一瓶好酒，值得读者细细品味Ｏ(≧▽≦)Ｏ"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762949950,"group_id":"7563590143009901593","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"真正的快乐，身体健康，精神富足。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyadjmT0cXtQ5e1UJldl2MrY11VjaTJ5IJ830Cq2FGki","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4e865bd40516432989d674b42ed545cc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621071&x-signature=y4Yp92ArO43LBbNLE1jJTIV1kW8%3D","user_id":"4371295305467357","user_name":"一只快乐蛙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4371295305467357","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1787302218,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{
